trends.summary: To support long-duration missions to the Moon and Mars, NASA and industry are developing technologies that can extract resources such as hydrogen and helium-3 from lunar soil, known as regolith. trends.headline: The OS-303 is an open source drop in replacement for a TB-303’s u650 microcontroller
trends.summary: The OS-303 processor is an open source TB-303 processor based on a Teensy microcontroller by Nicholas J. Michalek (Phazerville) in partnership with Michigan Synth Works. It is drop-in replacement for the u650 processor used in TB-303, TR-606, and TR-808. Currently only the TB-303 code is available.

trends.headline: openEMS – a free and open electromagnetic field solver
trends.summary: openEMS is a free and open electromagnetic field solver using the FDTD method. Octave/Matlab and Python used as an easy and flexible scripting interface. openEMS Features: fully 3D Cartesian and cylindrical coordinates graded mesh. trends.headline: Russia offers Ukraine May 8-9 ceasefire amid WWII anniversary, but threatens major reprisals in same breath
